notes: The file formalizes ω = dx/(2y+a₁x+a₃) for an elliptic curve over a field. The core lemma D_x_ne_zero (140 lines, maxHeartbeats 3200000) proves D(x) ≠ 0 via a formally-unramified/transcendence contradiction argument; its inner hne subproof is essentially duplicated verbatim in denom_ne_zero. The three public declarations (D_x_ne_zero, denom_ne_zero, invariantDifferential/invariantDifferential_ne_zero) are all heavily used downstream across the project.
